narration: What if your screen could be more vibrant than ever? Enter quantum dots.

narration: Quantum dots are tiny semiconductor particles that can emit specific colors when light hits them.
visual_description: Context visual: Quantum dots are tiny semiconductor particles that can emit specific colors when light hits them.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Quantum dots are tiny semiconductor particles that can emit specific colors when light hits them.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Quantum dots are tiny semiconductor particles that can emit specific colors when light hits them.

narration: This technology is revolutionizing displays, enhancing color accuracy and brightness. Imagine movies that pop!

narration: Studies show quantum dot displays can be up to 50% more efficient than traditional LEDs.
